name: One-Punch Man
description:
One-Punch Man (ワンパンマン Vampamman, lit. "One Punch Man") is a Japanese webcomic created by a mangaka under the pseudonym ONE.

**Take part in a series of randomly generated novel plots.**
(Core with Multiverse AI)

- enter "yes", Enter (send message) -  this starts the initialization of the AI.
- If you don’t want to answer questions about clarifying existing characters, enter “default, distribute settings automatically.”

***
GURPS (Generic Universal RolePlaying System):
Features: Flexible and versatile system that allows you to create characters and customize rules to suit different genres and moods.
Advantages: Wide range of customization options, support for different genres, realistic approach.
creator: alexiangel
